.file-embed.background: rgb(253, 252, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FDFCFC 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FDFCFC, color-mix(in srgb, #FDFCFC 65%, transparent))
